changes: v3.93: Route & Terrain Intelligence — GPX/TCX attachments parsed into routes.json. Climb detection (Cat 4–HC), descent detection, course character, elevation smoothing. Cached by attachment ID. has_terrain flag on events.
v3.94: Phase detection rewrite — live 4-week bucketing from activities_28d. Eliminates stale history.json row bug. recent_activities widened to 28 days.
v3.95: 500m polyline in routes.json, start_time on planned events, indoor flag passthrough.
v3.96: Course character fix — elevation_per_km only, absolute thresholds removed.
v11.23: No Conversational Data Substitution — AI must re-read JSON before citing metrics. No cached values from prior messages.

v11.24–v11.25: Route & Terrain Protocol — terrain-adjusted power, wind overlay, segment reasoning, drafting, nutrition timing, pre-ride briefing flow, course character table. 11 evidence base entries.

Hash-based cache invalidation on all cached files. On-demand sync path (phone/browser). Pre-workout terrain context block. Report template/example alignment. External API reference (Strava + yr.no). routes.json documentation sweep.
Upgrade: replace your sync.py + pull fresh docs. Most files touched.
